intro: Koanophyllon calcicola, also known as the limestone plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent the growth of microorganisms. The bioactive constituents of Koanophyllon calcicola include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Koanophyllon calcicola is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often employed to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and gastrointestinal disorders.
